subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from this Wronged One, Who hath been imprisoned in the well of envy and hatred by that which the hands have wrought [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من هذا المظلوم الذی سجن فی بئر الحسد و البغضا بما اکتسبت ایدی
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
